markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on weekly client tasks and introduce a new Notion workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [A new Notion board will centralize task tracking to replace scattered Slack updates and improve visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [**You.com:** Paused new articles. A "North Star" article is with the client to align on feedback (choppy sentences, repetition) before editing the backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
  - [**Logic:** A keyword gap analysis is the top priority, using updated competitor info to generate new topics for client approval.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [**SentinelOne:** Resuming CVE page publishing this week, which reduces standard article output from 5 to 4 per week.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [**Holiday Prep:** Team to update Notion with a 2-week content runway by EOD today to enable a comprehensive client update on Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)

## Topics

### New Notion Workflow

  - [A new Notion hub now centralizes task tracking, replacing scattered Slack updates.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [**Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
      - [**Project Board:** Recurring tasks + weekly one-off tasks (e.g., keyword research, artifact updates).](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
      - [**Weekly Pages:** A new page for each week's tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [**Goal:** Improve visibility and reduce Slack noise.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [**Team Request:** Update the board with weekly articles by EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
      - [**Why:** To create a 2-week content runway for a comprehensive client update on Friday, covering the holiday period.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)

### Client Updates

#### You.com (Iana)

  - [**Problem:** Client (Brooke) is overwhelmed by review time (30-40 min/article) due to recurring feedback (choppy sentences, repetition).](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1226.0)
  - [**Solution:** Paused new articles to align on feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
      - [Bailey edited one article ("What is LLM hallucination?") as a "North Star" example.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
      - [It's now with Brooke for review to recalibrate expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** A mismatch between content intent and execution.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
      - [**Example:** Top-of-funnel articles for engineers use complex terms without definition, creating a voice/tone mismatch.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
      - [**Potential Fix:** Redefine persona artifacts to align with different content types (e.g., top-of-funnel vs. bottom-of-funnel).](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)

#### Logic (Rachel)

  - [**Top Priority:** Keyword gap analysis, using updated competitor info.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
      - [**Why:** To generate new topic assignments for client approval early this week.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [**Pipeline Automation:** Bailey will submit a Linear ticket to automate manual steps.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [Rachel to provide the link to the new pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [**Article Updates:** Rachel will use Claude to update old articles with new positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
      - [**Why:** Refresher pipelines have been ineffective.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
      - [Bailey will also request auto-publishing to simplify future updates.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

#### SentinelOne (Iana)

  - [**Action:** Resuming CVE page publishing this week.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
      - [**Impact:** Standard article output reduced from 5 to 4 per week.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [**Status:** Awaiting confirmation that the code freeze is lifted.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [**Automation:** Marcus is near completion on the GitHub/CVE connection.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
      - [**Iana:** Will confirm if enough pre-existing CVEs are in Airtable for this week's publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
      - [**Bailey:** Will follow up with Marcus on the connection status.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)

#### HX (Rachel)

  - [**Status:** Rachel has updated artifacts with new competitor info and delivered two articles.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**Blockers:** Client must finalize blog categories, featured images, and approve more topics in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [**Content Runway:** \~7-8 approved topics remain, sufficient through Jan 5.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)

#### Otto (Fatima)

  - [**Status:** Awaiting editorial approval for last week's articles.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [**Action:** Once approved, Fatima will update Airtable to "ready for client review."](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
      - [**Why:** An automation will then email the client directly, unblocking the process.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)

#### Relay (Fatima)

  - [**Feedback:** Client finds intros/conclusions repetitive.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [**Context:** This feedback follows a large batch review. Fatima has already been working to vary the tone.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [**Action:** Continue to monitor for repetition in new articles.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)

#### Luker (Iana)

  - [**Challenge:** Client publishes articles directly, making tracking difficult.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
      - [**Iana:** Check the client site every Tuesday morning for new content.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
      - [**Bailey:** Ask for updates in the weekly meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
      - [**Why:** This manual process is the only option, and it's the client's responsibility to report new publications.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**All:** Update Notion with a 2-week content runway by EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
      - [Share updated Logic strategy doc with Rachel.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
      - [Submit Linear ticket for Logic pipeline automation.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [Follow up with Marcus on SentinelOne's CVE connection status.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
  - [**Rachel:**](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
      - [Complete HX competitor analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
      - [Begin Logic keyword gap analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
      - [Provide Bailey with the new Logic pipeline link.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [Update old Logic articles in Claude.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [**Fatima:**](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
      - [Update Otto articles to "ready for client review" after editorial approval.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [**Iana:**](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
      - [Confirm SentinelOne CVE page readiness for this week.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
      - [Check Luker's site for new articles every Tuesday.](https://fathom.video/share/zLh2jX69iJNY4ytaFQx7bDiw-HEMkXb8?tab=summary&timestamp=1137.0)
